channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: MyBatis SQL Capture - Fri May 15 05:07:36 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: OSV Vulnerability Scanner - Thu May 14 08:10:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
A free, open-source IntelliJ IDEA plugin that provides security vulnerability scanning for open-source dependencies using the OSV database.
vendor: dyuti downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.dyuti.osvplugin
